steps.instruction: Create a rectangular box body 80x50x40 mm.
Add a triangular prism roof on top of the existing body. The roof should span the body width and depth.
Create the rectangular body of a small birdhouse.
Add a triangular roof on top of the body.
Add a round entrance hole at the center of the front face.
Add a cylindrical perch below the entrance hole, protruding outward from the front face.
Add a round hole on the front face, left of center.
Add a second round hole on the front face, right of center.
Create a lower rectangular block 100x60x20 mm.
Add a smaller rectangular block on top at the center.
Add a round hole at the center of the front face of the lower block.
Add a cylindrical pin on the right side face, centered on that face.
Add a cylindrical cut on the bottom face, centered on that face.
